Package qtouch

Class QTouchModel

java.lang.Object
qtouch.QTouchModel
public class QTouchModel extends Object
Model class â€“ holds all constants, variables, and game states. Defines configuration and data shared across the app.

  • Method Details

    • setSavedGameConfig

      public void setSavedGameConfig(String config)
      Stores the serialized saved game configuration.
      Parameters:
      config - the save string

    • getSavedGameConfig

      public String getSavedGameConfig()
      Returns the serialized saved game configuration string.
      Returns:
      saved game config

    • getRemainingCards

      public int getRemainingCards()
      Returns:
      how many cards are left in the deck

    • setRemainingCards

      public void setRemainingCards(int remainingCards)
      Sets the number of cards remaining in the deck.
      Parameters:
      remainingCards - the amount left

    • isPlayer1Turn

      public boolean isPlayer1Turn()
      Returns:
      true if it's Player 1's turn

    • setPlayer1Turn

      public void setPlayer1Turn(boolean player1Turn)
      Sets the active player's turn.
      Parameters:
      player1Turn - true when Player 1 is active

    • isGameStarted

      public boolean isGameStarted()
      Returns:
      true if the game has started

    • setGameStarted

      public void setGameStarted(boolean gameStarted)
      Sets whether the game has started.
      Parameters:
      gameStarted - true to mark game as active

    • isPaused

      public boolean isPaused()
      Returns:
      true if the game is currently paused

    • setPaused

      public void setPaused(boolean paused)
      Sets whether the game is paused.
      Parameters:
      paused - true to pause, false to resume

    • switchTurn

      public void switchTurn()
      Switches the active player turn.

    • getCurrentPosition

      public String getCurrentPosition()
      Returns:
      current board position (0, 1, J, I, P, M)

    • setCurrentPosition

      public void setCurrentPosition(String currentPosition)
      Sets the current board position.
      Parameters:
      currentPosition - the new board marker

    • getTimeLeft

      public int getTimeLeft()
      Returns:
      time left in the player's turn

    • setTimeLeft

      public void setTimeLeft(int timeLeft)
      Sets the countdown timer for the turn.
      Parameters:
      timeLeft - seconds remaining
